name: John Kerry
abstract: John Forbes Kerry (born December 11, 1943) is an American attorney, politician, diplomat, and former naval officer who served as the 68th United States secretary of state from 2013 to 2017 in the administration of President Barack Obama. A member of the Democratic Party, he previously represented Massachusetts in the United States Senate…

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Heath
about_quotes.evidence: Was it Kerry, John Kerry, or something? Anyway, Obama had made a speech...
